headline: Online Marketplace Counterfeit Goods Worth RM1.8 Billion Seized
context: KPDNHEP and Customs seized RM1.8 billion in counterfeit goods sold through online marketplaces in 2025.

cards.big: RM1.8 billion in counterfeit goods from online marketplaces seized in 2025
cards.sub: Electronics cosmetics and branded clothing comprised 82% of seizures

cards.big: 45 warehouse raids across 8 states targeted fulfilment centres
cards.sub: Goods shipped from 12 countries through Malaysian e-commerce platforms

cards.big: Platform liability remains unclear as sellers not platform face prosecution
cards.sub: Consumer complaints about counterfeits reached 28,000 across major platforms

cards.big: Only 4,200 sellers suspended with most reopening under new accounts
cards.sub: Platforms earn commission on counterfeit sales without penalty

cards.big: Counterfeit enforcement tests whether platforms share responsibility for goods sold through their systems
RM1.8 billion counterfeit goods seized online. Marketplace liability must match marketplace profit from transactions.
